title: olearia phlogopappa subsp. angustifolia
intro: Olearia phlogopappa subsp. angustifolia, also known as Swamp Olearia or Narrow-leaved Olearia, is a plant species native to Australia and Tasmania, characterized by its shrub-like growth and purple flowers. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Olearia phlogopappa subsp. angustifolia include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to produce a tea or by drying and processing the plant material into capsules, tablets, or tinctures.
